title: Isar Aerospace Announces New Launch Date Alongside Series D Funding
summary:
German launch startup Isar Aerospace announced on 9 June that it had closed a €270 million Series D to “drive global scaling and ramp up serial production.” With the announcement, the company stated that the months-delayed second flight of Spectrum was now expected to take place between 15 and 21 June. Isar Aerospace is developing […]

title: NASA Knows: What Is Mass Distribution?
summary: This article is for students grades 5-8. Mass distribution affects everything from galaxy shapes to aircraft design to planetary rotation. title: Iceye raises 1 billion euros to expand SAR satellite systems
summary:
Iceye, a Finnish company that develops and operates radar imaging satellites, has raised more than 1 billion euros in a round that values it at more than 10 billion euros.

title: We’re back: Proba-3 ready for more science
summary: The Proba-3 mission’s Coronagraph spacecraft and its main scientific instrument, ASPIICS, are both at full health, ready to resume routine formation flying operations and deliver more breathtaking artificial eclipses.

title: Isar Aerospace raises 270 million euros for global launch expansion
summary:
European launch company Isar Aerospace has raised 270 million euros ($312 million) to support its global expansion as it prepares for its next launch attempt.

title: Live coverage: NASA to unveil Artemis 3 crew, provide updates on mission
summary: The mission will be a low Earth orbit rendezvous between the Orion spacecraft and one or both of the Human Landing System landers: Blue Origin’s Blue Moon Mark 2 and SpaceX’s Starship.
